summary: Created 7-phase implementation plan for expanding modal cube proof systems. Phase 1: infrastructure refactoring (parameterize DerivationTree, add typeclasses). Phase 2: S5 preservation + Instances.lean. Phase 3: HilbertDerivedRules integration. Phases 4-6: per-system soundness/completeness for K, T, D, S4 (parallelizable). Phase 7: final integration. Estimated 22 hours, ~2200 new lines.

artifacts.summary: 7-phase plan covering infrastructure refactoring, typeclass hierarchy expansion, per-system soundness/completeness, and integration
